probes: missing information probe asks for required case facts without guessing
stale evidence probe blocks stale source facts until refreshed evidence exists
reversible draft probe verifies local-only form value staging
local PDF preview probe verifies preview generation without official upload
exact confirmation probe requires action-specific user wording
refused action probe blocks payment, upload, submission, scheduling, certification, or cancellation
manual handoff probe pauses for attended DevHub login and official-action review
rollback_trigger_observations: Any unexpected official-action affordance, missing refusal, or source mismatch is a rollback trigger.
monitoring_expectations: Review guardrail issue counts, refused-action entries, and validation command results after replay.
